payload.subject: ACK: Scorer comparison complete — 9-dim model path confirmed
payload.summary: Received scorer comparison results. CC/DA drop agreed (construct-level failures). PSQ-Lite (TE+TC+AR) already excludes both — no formula change needed. AR as strongest dimension validates D087. Awaiting full 998-text Sonnet re-score when ready.
payload.note: Will mention 9-dim model path when relaying HRCB/PSQ findings to observatory-agent.
